Results-driven product leader with 15+ years of experience in AI-driven product strategy, digital transformation, and enterprise SaaS development. Expertise in scaling high-impact products, optimizing operational efficiency, and leading cross-functional teams. Passionate about building customer-centric solutions that drive revenue growth and streamline complex workflows.
SELECTED ACHIEVEMENTS
•	Enterprise Digital Transformation: Led a $1B modernization initiative at Cigna, optimizing claims adjudication workflows and increasing efficiency by 25% while ensuring regulatory compliance and scalability.
•	AI & Customer Experience: Spearheaded AI-driven automation at Blink Health, reducing manual interventions by 30%, accelerating provider-patient interactions, and improving customer satisfaction (NPS +15 points).
•	Omnichannel Retail & Logistics Optimization: Built and scaled a real-time logistics optimization platform at Wayfair, reducing delivery costs by 15%, improving fleet efficiency, and enhancing customer fulfillment speed.
•	Marketplace & Revenue Growth: Developed and launched a two-sided Digital Health Formulary (DHF) marketplace, increasing client adoption by 20%, unlocking new revenue opportunities, and expanding strategic partnerships.
•	Leadership & Cross-Functional Execution: Built and scaled high-performing product teams, mentoring 12+ PMs, with 70% advancing to leadership roles, fostering a culture of ownership & innovation.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Blink Health | Principal Product Manager | Aug 2023 – Present
•	Optimized doctor and payer engagement strategies, contributing to a 30% reduction in operational costs and elevating customer satisfaction scores through personalized, data-driven solutions.
•	Drove regulatory compliance & security improvements, ensuring platform alignment with privacy laws and optimizing digital trust and security for customer data.

This is like throwing down the gauntlet.. hats off..

Stephen RemediosStephen Remedios
 • 2nd • 2nd
Partner & Associate Director at Boston Consulting Group (BCG)Partner & Associate Director at Boston Consulting Group (BCG)
I'm going to put my neck out and make this argument.

"If you went to XIM Bhubaneswar and took Prof. Govindrajan Srinivas's electives, you are at a competitive advantage in today's AI world."

Back in '99-'01, his exams were all open book. You could bring as many texts to every quiz he administered.

What was he actually testing then? "Common Sense" is what he would cheerfully retort!

In a recent conversation with me, he mentioned allowing students to use ChatGPT in addition to text books in all his examinations!

I was blown away. In a world where AI has all the answers how do create an exam that differentiates the quality of thinking of students?

It takes a special mind to create questions that shine a bright light on elements of human intelligence that AI (for the moment!) is yet to master.

He has kindly agreed to co-author a short piece with me that illuminates his framework when it comes to working with AI.

Look out for it!

For the moment, enjoy a glimpse of a timeless quiz, when Open Book was revolutionary. Also read the preface to the exam, when OpenAI became the new norm!

I am delighted to recommend Anurag for any product management role. I had the pleasure of working with him at Wayfair, where I was impressed by his exceptional skills in product development, leadership, and communication.

Anurag has a natural ability to create a long-term product roadmap that aligns with company goals and the needs of the target audience. Overall, Anurag is a standout product manager who brings exceptional skills in product development, leadership, and communication. I was lucky to have been part of Anurag’s team for close to 10 years, beginning with Cognizant in 2012 and subsequently in Cigna. 
Anurag is easily the finest Product Manager I have worked with. His clarity of thought and the ability to think big makes him stand out. He innovates on behalf of customers, truly believes in being their voice and advocates for them. His vision for new products is unparalleled and has translated into multiple successful technology solutions over the years.
Besides his individual contribution, Anurag is at his most inspiring as a people leader. He is a friend, philosopher, guide and mentor rolled into one for all his team members. He leads by example, practices transparency and strives to create a healthy work environment. His strength as a leader is in being the voice of reason in high pressure situations, a quality that I have personally tried to imbibe from him.
Anurag has been a huge influence on me and is someone I look up to.
